## LibraryRuntime.IConfectionBase.isBarTruffle() method

Returns true if this is a bar truffle confection. When true, bar truffle-specific properties are available.

**Signature:**

```typescript
isBarTruffle(): this is IBarTruffle;
```
**Returns:**

this is [IBarTruffle](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.ibartruffle.md)
